title: Post-Feature Report: Talent Generation Rebalance
scope: Complete overhaul of the talent generation system to fix a scoring crisis. Teams were routinely putting up 100+ points because the engine generated too many 90+ OVR players with maxed-out stats.

rationale.item: Hidden per-team offset in the runtime code path (team_center_offset = random.gauss(0, 25)) could add +50 points to any team's base stats
Inflated stat centers, narrow gaussian spreads, no hard ceiling on generation produced wall-to-wall 90+ OVR rosters

actions.description: Archetype centers dropped (blue_blood 95→64, national_power 89→52, etc.); spread 3-6→38; generation ceiling 99→85; stat budget center×11+44; hidden gem caps 100→85; archetype thresholds lowered; conference floors -30
Removed team_center_offset (random.gauss(0,25) hidden bug) and fixed hidden gem cap
Recruiting star ranges shifted down 30 (5-star: 83-98→49-63); position boost caps to 85; OVR floor 40→10
Portal stat ranges shifted down 30; 5-star potential 10%→6%; position boost caps to 85
Development gain tables halved (quick: +2to+5→+1to+3, normal: +1to+3→+0to+2, etc.); OVR floor 40→10
FCS filler generation disabled with 205 real teams

risk_posture: Archetype thresholds were lowered to match the 85 ceiling. If the ceiling changes significantly, these thresholds need to be rescaled or most players will default to generic archetypes.
Existing dynasty saves are unaffected. Players already generated retain inflated stats until they graduate.
UI display: player cards now show stats in the 30s-70s range — correct but may feel 'wrong' initially.
FCS generation is disabled but not deleted — dead code in engine/season.py.
residual_risks: Existing dynasty saves retain inflated talent until natural attrition
FCS generation disabled but not deleted — dead code
open_hooks: Tuning levers documented in table: stat_center, stat_spread, generation ceiling, stat budget headroom, development gains, development ceiling, hidden gem boost, portal ranges, recruit ranges
section_headers_original: What This Means for Each Mode
unmapped_content: Branch: claude/balance-talent-generation-mS413. PR: #240. Date: 2026-03-27. Additional files vs docs/aar_2026-03-25_talent_generation_balance.md: engine/game_engine.py (removes team_center_offset), engine/development.py (development gains halved), engine/player_card.py (OVR floor), engine/season.py (FCS filler disabled). The key additional bug not in the 2026-03-25 version: team_center_offset = random.gauss(0, 25) was a hidden per-team offset that could add +50 to a team's effective stat center. This is the 'single biggest bug' per the document. Development gains halved (not mentioned in 2026-03-25 document). This document covers the same workstream as docs/aar_2026-03-25_talent_generation_balance.md but from 2 days later with additional bugs/files discovered.
parser_notes: Document titled 'Post-Feature Report' not AAR — genre_confidence medium. Date confirmed: 2026-03-27. This is a related but distinct document from docs/aar_2026-03-25_talent_generation_balance.md (2 days earlier), covering the same workstream but adding: team_center_offset bug, development.py halved gains, FCS filler disabled, engine/season.py and player_card.py changes. Both parsed as separate records.
